setTransform_matrix.description: setTransform with custom skew matrix (AA diff expected on diagonal edges)

ellipse_filled.description: Filled ellipse via ellipse() path command

quarter_arcs.description: Four quarter-circle arcs in different colors

stroked_circle.description: Stroked circle outline with thick line

hex_alpha_colors.description: Hex colors with alpha channel (#RRGGBBAA and #RGBA)

rotate_rect.description: Rectangle rotated 30 degrees around its center

miter_limit.description: Miter limit causing bevel fallback on sharp angles

overlapping_strokes.description: Multiple stroked paths with alpha blending

wide_stroke.description: Very wide stroke on a curved path

diagonal_lines.description: Diagonal lines at various angles for anti-aliasing test

multi_bezier_path.description: Connected bezier curves forming a smooth path

filled_bezier.description: Filled shape defined by bezier curves

alpha_gradient_rects.description: Series of rects with decreasing alpha (manual gradient)

spiral_path.description: Spiral drawn with many short line segments

donut_shape.description: Donut using two concentric circle paths (winding rule)

clip_rect.description: Rectangular clip path — fill large rect but only visible inside clip region

clip_circle.description: Circular clip path — rects drawn through circular window

clip_nested.description: Nested clip paths — inner clip further restricts outer

clip_transform.description: Clip path with transform applied — rotated clip region

gradient_linear_basic.description: Linear gradient fill from red to blue across rectangle

gradient_linear_multi.description: Linear gradient with multiple color stops (rainbow)

composite_destination_out.description: globalCompositeOperation destination-out — erases where new shape is drawn

arcto_rounded_rect.description: Rounded rectangle using arcTo for corners

arcto_simple.description: Simple arcTo connecting two line segments with a curve

named_colors_extended.description: Extended named colors: coral, navy, teal, salmon, olive, maroon, silver, etc.

tiny_arc.description: Very small arcs (radius < 1) — edge case for arc approximation

zero_width_stroke.description: Stroke with lineWidth = 0 should be invisible

negative_rect_dims.description: fillRect with negative width and height — should still render

large_coordinates.description: Shapes at very large coordinates, partially visible

degenerate_bezier.description: Bezier with all control points at the same location — should be a dot or nothing

multiple_beginpath.description: Multiple beginPath calls without fill/stroke — only last path should render

fill_rule_evenodd.description: Self-intersecting polygon — evenodd vs default winding fill

transform_mid_path.description: Change transform mid-path; Canvas2D applies transform at fill time to whole path

scaled_stroke_width.description: Non-uniform scale affects stroke width differently per axis

transform_order_rotate_scale.description: Rotate then scale — order matters for final result

transform_order_scale_rotate.description: Scale then rotate — different result from rotate-then-scale

transform_persist_across_paths.description: Transform persists across multiple beginPath/fill calls without reset

set_transform_overrides.description: setTransform overrides accumulated transforms instead of compounding

composite_source_atop.description: globalCompositeOperation source-atop — new shape only where it overlaps existing

composite_destination_over.description: globalCompositeOperation destination-over — draws behind existing content

composite_xor.description: globalCompositeOperation xor — shows non-overlapping parts only

composite_darken.description: globalCompositeOperation darken — picks darker of overlapping pixels

composite_lighten.description: globalCompositeOperation lighten — picks lighter of overlapping pixels

composite_overlay.description: globalCompositeOperation overlay — multiplies dark, screens light

composite_copy.description: globalCompositeOperation copy — replaces everything with new shape

gradient_linear_fill.description: Linear gradient red→blue horizontal, fill full canvas

gradient_radial_fill.description: Radial gradient yellow→purple centered on canvas

gradient_multi_stop_fill.description: Vertical linear gradient with 4 stops: red→yellow→green→blue

shadow_fillrect.description: Red rectangle with dark drop shadow

shadow_filltext.description: White text with red drop shadow

roundrect_basic.description: Rounded rectangle with uniform corner radius

roundrect_varied.description: Rounded rectangle with varying corner radii

text_baseline_top.description: Text with textBaseline=top aligned to reference line

text_baseline_middle.description: Text with textBaseline=middle aligned to reference line

text_baseline_bottom.description: Text with textBaseline=bottom aligned to reference line

composite_color_dodge.description: globalCompositeOperation color-dodge — brightens base by blend

composite_color_burn.description: globalCompositeOperation color-burn — darkens base by blend

composite_hard_light.description: globalCompositeOperation hard-light — multiply or screen depending on blend

composite_soft_light.description: globalCompositeOperation soft-light — softer version of hard-light

clip_fillrect.description: Rectangular clip with fillRect — red only inside 100x100 clip region

clip_arc_fill.description: Circular clip with arc — blue only inside circle

clip_with_transform.description: Clip with translate+rotate — purple only inside rotated square

clip_nested_rects.description: Nested clips — red only where both rectangles overlap (inner rect)

arcto_corner.description: arcTo producing a shape with one rounded corner

arcto_full_roundrect.description: Full rounded rectangle via 4 arcTo calls

clip_multi_draw.description: Multiple clip regions with different colored fills in two corners

clip_with_stroke.description: Clip affecting stroke — only the arc portion inside the clip rect is visible

drawimage_inline_basic.description: drawImage with inline 4x4 checkerboard at natural size

drawimage_inline_scaled.description: drawImage 5-arg: scale a 4x4 checkerboard up to 80x80

drawimage_crop_9arg.description: drawImage 9-arg: crop center 2x2 from a 4x4 source, scale to 80x80

drawimage_with_transform.description: drawImage inline with rotation and scaling transforms applied

drawimage_clip.description: drawImage clipped by a circular clip path

putimagedata_basic.description: putImageData writing a 4x4 color grid directly to canvas

putimagedata_ignores_transform.description: putImageData should ignore canvas transform (per spec)

shadow_on_stroked_path.description: Shadow applied to a stroked arc path

radial_gradient_offset_center.description: Radial gradient with different inner and outer circle centers

radial_gradient_concentric_tight.description: Radial gradient with very small inner radius to large outer radius

text_shadow_blur_extremes.description: fillText with shadowBlur 0, 100, and 150 side by side

text_large_font.description: fillText with font size 72px validates large glyph rendering

clip_after_transform.description: Clip path respects current transform (rotate 45 deg then clip circle)

nested_clip_transform.description: Nested clip paths with transforms at each level

save_restore_style_leak.description: Deep save/restore verifies all style properties restored correctly

composite_source_in.description: globalCompositeOperation source-in — only intersection of new and existing

composite_destination_out_punch.description: globalCompositeOperation destination-out — punch a hole with overlapping shape
